data.name: Pref_ShowWelcome
data.value: Show the welcome page on startup

data.name: Welcome_Message
data.value: Open a Therion configuration file or folder to begin.

data.name: Pref_DebugHelp
data.value: Low-level switches for the embedded web views (3D viewer, structural plots). Changes take effect after restarting ThIDE.

data.name: Pref_DbgDisableDmabufHelp
data.value: Works around a blank (white/black) web panel on many Linux systems (NVIDIA drivers, Wayland). Linux only; on by default. Ignored when WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER is already set externally.

data.name: Pref_DbgDisableCompositingHelp
data.value: Forces software rendering when the panel is still blank. Disables WebGL, so the 3D viewer cannot render — intended for the 2D structural plots. Linux only; off by default.

data.name: Pref_DbgOffscreenHelp
data.value: Renders web content through the app compositor instead of embedding a native window. May fix embedding problems, may affect input handling. Linux only; off by default.

data.name: Pref_DbgDevToolsHelp
data.value: Allows opening the engine’s inspector/DevTools from the 3D viewer panel and via right-click ▸ Inspect. All platforms; on by default.

data.name: Common_FitAll
data.value: Fit all columns to their content

data.name: Common_FullStationName
data.value: Show full station name (survey.station) instead of the station only

data.name: Struct_CheckAllStation
data.value: Check/uncheck all measurements from this station

data.name: Struct_DetectionHelp
data.value: A shot is structural if it matches any enabled signal. Tune these to your survey's convention.

data.name: Struct_IncludeOrigin
data.value: Include the from-station (origin) point in the fit

data.name: Struct_IncludeOriginHelp
data.value: Use only when the station itself lies on the measured plane — watch the RMS column.

data.name: Struct_DeclinationHelp
data.value: Adds to strike / dip-direction (true north); dip is unaffected. Off by default to avoid double-counting a survey's own declination.

data.name: Struct_ExportMeasTip
data.value: Export the measurements grid to a CSV file

data.name: Struct_MeasHelp
data.value: Tick the points to include in each plane fit. Toggling recomputes that plane live. Double-click a row to jump to its source.

data.name: Struct_ShowAllPlanes
data.value: Show every plane in the 3D plot

data.name: Struct_ShowInPreviewTip
data.value: Overlay the visible resulted planes on the Mainline Preview as thick strike/dip lines; click a line there to select its plane here

data.name: Struct_PopOutPlotTip
data.value: Move the 3D plot into its own dockable/floatable panel

data.name: Struct_ExportPlanesTip
data.value: Export the resulted-planes grid to a CSV file

data.name: Struct_PlaneDiscTip
data.value: Show this plane's disc in the 3D plot

data.name: Struct_ExportImageTip
data.value: Save the current view as a PNG

data.name: Struct_DiscSizeTip
data.value: Enlarge the plane discs (they are tiny next to the cave)

data.name: Struct_ShowSplaysTip
data.value: Show the splay (wall) shots in the 3D plot

data.name: Struct_FadedSplaysTip
data.value: Draw the splays in a faded colour blended toward the background so they stay subtle

data.name: Struct_PlotFallback
data.value: The 3D plot needs the bundled three.js assets and a system web engine (WebView2 / WebKit).

data.name: Proj_NoSurveys
data.value: No surveys in the workspace yet.

data.name: Proj_Audit_NotCalculated
data.value: Click Calculate to search and show orphan files, unreferenced scraps and unexported maps.

data.name: Proj_Audit_Orphans
data.value: Orphan files (not bound to any thconfig in this workspace)

data.name: Proj_Audit_AddExclusionTip
data.value: Pick a folder whose files the orphan scan should ignore (backups, archives, scratch work).

data.name: Proj_Meta_Intro
data.value: Workspace metadata (stored in a sidecar, not in the .th source).

data.name: Quality_ShowInBrowser
data.value: Show these in the Object Browser

data.name: Notif_LayoutNeedsTwoMonitors
data.value: This layout needs at least two monitors (and an enabled preview panel).

data.name: Blender_Fail_NotFound
data.value: Blender was not found. Set its path in Preferences ▸ External tools.

data.name: Blender_Fail_TooOld
data.value: The installed Blender is too old — version 4.2 or newer is required.

data.name: Blender_Fail_DiskSpace
data.value: Not enough free disk space for this render.

data.name: Tb_GoToSymbolDoc
data.value: Go to symbol in this document

data.name: Tb_ShowOutputs
data.value: Show Generated Files and the first "export model" command

data.name: Status_OpenFolderFailed
data.value: Could not open '{0}' in the file manager.

data.name: Build_SavePromptMsg
data.value: {0} file(s) involved in this build have unsaved changes:

data.name: Rename_PreviewSummary
data.value: {0} occurrence(s) across {1} file(s). Double-click an entry to jump to it.

data.name: Pref_ReopenSession
data.value: Reopen files from last session on startup

data.name: Pref_LanguageHelp
data.value: Language applies immediately to menus and labels.

data.name: Pref_AutoSaveHelp
data.value: Dirty files are written automatically; the delay applies to the After-a-delay mode.

data.name: Pref_Telemetry
data.value: Record anonymous usage & crash reports (stored locally, never sent)

data.name: Pref_TelemetryHelp
data.value: Off by default. When on, events and crash reports are written under %AppData%/ThIDE/telemetry and never leave your machine.

data.name: Pref_ThemeHelp
data.value: The Dark theme adapts both control and editor syntax colors.

data.name: Pref_CustomColors
data.value: Use custom syntax colors (overrides the theme palette)

data.name: Pref_CustomColorsHelp
data.value: Enter #RRGGBB hex values; the swatch previews each color.

data.name: Pref_RenamePreview
data.value: Show a preview before applying a symbol rename

data.name: Pref_FormatOnSave
data.value: Format document on save (re-indent to block nesting)

data.name: Pref_EditorFeaturesHelp
data.value: Enable or disable individual editor enhancements. A feature greyed out here was switched off at build time.

data.name: Pref_PerfHelp1
data.value: Above these limits, syntax highlighting and hover features are disabled.

data.name: Pref_PerfHelp2
data.value: Above these limits, the file is not parsed and its identifiers stay out of the object graph.

data.name: Pref_PerfHelp3
data.value: Caps how many stations the "Go to Symbol" / station search (Ctrl+Shift+P) lists, so very large caves stay responsive.

data.name: Pref_PerfHelp4
data.value: On startup, last-session files are reopened until this time budget is reached; the rest are skipped (logged in the Log panel) so big workspaces stay launchable. 0 = no limit.

data.name: Pref_ReloadExternal
data.value: Reload open files changed outside the editor

data.name: Pref_UpdateGraph
data.value: Update the object graph when files change on disk

data.name: Pref_QuickOpenScope
data.value: Go to File (Ctrl+P): search only files connected to the active thconfig

data.name: Pref_QuickOpenHelp
data.value: When off, Ctrl+P searches every Therion file in the workspace folder (history is always included).

data.name: Pref_OpenAll
data.value: Open every matching output (otherwise just the first)

data.name: Pref_CompileOnSave
data.value: Compile on save (rebuild the active thconfig on save)

data.name: Pref_CompileOnSaveHelp
data.value: Debounced background build; watch the spinner and the Log panel. Off by default.

data.name: Pref_EnsureDirs
data.value: Create missing output folders before compiling

data.name: Pref_EnsureDirsHelp
data.value: Checks each export's output directory and creates it recursively if absent (Therion otherwise fails on a missing folder). An info line is logged when a folder is created. On by default.

data.name: Pref_AutoSaveBeforeCompile
data.value: Save modified files automatically before compiling

data.name: Pref_AutoSaveBeforeCompileHelp
data.value: When off, compiling first asks whether to save the involved unsaved files (naming them). When on, they are saved automatically with no prompt. Off by default.

data.name: Pref_AutoRecalcLeads
data.value: Recompute the Leads register as you type

data.name: Pref_AutoRecalcLeadsHelp
data.value: Refreshes the Workspace ▸ Leads register live from the unsaved editor buffers (debounced), not only on save. On by default — turn off on very large workspaces. The Rescan button always works.

data.name: Pref_VisualizationHelp
data.value: Enable or disable the read-only preview features. Disabling one hides its panel and menu (reset the layout or restart to remove an open panel).

data.name: Pref_Vis_LivePreview
data.value: Mainline centreline preview (plan/elevation sketch from the model, no compile)

data.name: Pref_Vis_MapAuto
data.value: Auto-show the rendered map after a build

data.name: Pref_Vis_MapShowOnLoad
data.value: Auto-show first map on workspace load

data.name: Pref_Vis_Model3D
data.value: Embedded 3D model viewer (CaveView.js in a native web view)

data.name: Pref_Vis_Model3DAuto
data.value: Auto-show the 3D model (.lox / .3d) after a build

data.name: Pref_SurveyAnalyticsHelp
data.value: Disable on very large workspaces to skip the extra processing on each graph rebuild.

data.name: Pref_Analytics_ObjectBrowser
data.value: Object Browser entity tabs (surveys, fixes, equates, scraps, maps, points, lines, areas)

data.name: Pref_Diag_LocalFixGrounds
data.value: Treat a local fix (no cs) as grounding a disconnected survey

data.name: Pref_Diag_LocalFixGroundsHelp
data.value: When off (default), a disconnected piece anchored only by a bare fix (e.g. fix 0 0 0 with no coordinate system) is still warned about. Turn on to treat any fix as grounding and suppress the "disconnected survey" warning (TH_SEM_015) for those pieces.

data.name: Pref_ScriptHooks
data.value: Enable script hooks (run a command on open / save / build)

data.name: Pref_ScriptHooksHelp
data.value: Use {file} for the file path (active thconfig for build). Disable for big workspaces.

data.name: Pref_LoadPlugins
data.value: Load plugins (custom semantic rules from the plugins folder)

data.name: Pref_LoadPluginsHelp
data.value: Drop plugin .dll files (types implementing ISemanticRule) in %AppData%/ThIDE/plugins. Loaded at startup; disable for performance. Changes apply on restart.

data.name: Pref_CliHelp
data.value: The headless CLI (therion-cli) and the LSP server (therion-lsp) are separate executables — see docs.

data.name: Pref_KbHelp
data.value: Click a gesture field and press the key combination to assign it.

data.name: Pref_GestureTip
data.value: Click and press a key combination

data.name: Diag_ProjectScopeTip
data.value: Show diagnostics from all thconfig workspace files (requires workspace)

data.name: Comp_OpenLogTip
data.value: Open the Therion log file in the editor

data.name: Log_LevelTip
data.value: Minimum level shown for new entries (does not re-filter older ones)

data.name: Outline_Empty
data.value: No survey/scrap structure in this file.

data.name: MapV_FitWindowTip
data.value: Shrink to fit the window (never enlarges past 100%)

data.name: MapV_OutputsTip
data.value: Compatible map outputs from the active thconfig (export map)

data.name: Panel_FloatScreenTip
data.value: Float on another monitor and maximize

data.name: MapV_OneScreenMsg
data.value: Only one monitor is available, so there is no other screen to move the panel to.

data.name: M3D_ModelTip
data.value: Models generated (or detected) from the active thconfig

data.name: M3D_DefaultsTip
data.value: Reset all switches to their default values

data.name: M3D_DevToolsTip
data.value: Open the web engine's developer tools (or F12 / right-click ▸ Inspect)

data.name: M3D_OpenUrlTip
data.value: Open a web address in the embedded viewer (testing)

data.name: M3D_OpenUrlInvalid
data.value: Enter a valid http:// or https:// address.

data.name: M3D_OpenUrlStatus
data.value: Showing an external page — press 🌐 again and OK to return to the 3D viewer.

data.name: Live_ProfE
data.value: Projected profile along east (90°) — classic east oriented, elevation projected profile

data.name: Live_CustomTip
data.value: Projected profile along a custom bearing (use the slider)

data.name: Live_AsLinesTip
data.value: On: faded lines · Off: only the far edge points

data.name: Live_LabelsTip
data.value: Show a name label at each station

data.name: Live_SurveyStationTip
data.value: Qualify each station label with its survey (survey.station)

data.name: Live_StationsTip
data.value: Show the small dot at each station

data.name: Live_JunctionsTip
data.value: Show clickable equate junctions (where surveys are stitched together)

data.name: Live_ClickToHighlightHint
data.value: Click on any line to highlight it.

data.name: Live_LegendTip
data.value: Show the legend / visibility list (hover a row to locate that group)

data.name: Live_SeparateTip
data.value: Spread disconnected pieces into a grid instead of stacking them at the origin

data.name: Live_ColSurveyTip
data.value: A distinct colour per survey (groups the legend by survey)

data.name: Live_ColFileTip
data.value: A distinct colour per source .th file (groups the legend by file)

data.name: Live_ComponentTip
data.value: A distinct colour per disconnected piece (reveals surveys stacked at the origin)

data.name: Live_GroupRowTip
data.value: Hover to locate · tick to show/hide

data.name: Gen_StaleBanner
data.value: ⚠ Some outputs are out of date — a workspace input changed since the last build. Rebuild to refresh.

data.name: Gen_AutoOpenTip
data.value: Auto-open after build — ▣ default (use settings) · ✓ always · ✗ never

data.name: Gen_GoToDefTip
data.value: Go to definition in the thconfig

data.name: File_ConfirmDiscard
data.value: Reloading will discard your unsaved changes. Continue?

data.name: File_NoMeasurements
data.value: No measurements found in this file.

data.name: File_SetActiveTip
data.value: Set this file as the active thconfig (workspace configuration)

data.name: File_SetWorkingDirTip
data.value: Set this file's folder as the working directory and make it the active thconfig

data.name: File_MapiahTip
data.value: Open this sketch in the Mapiah editor (changes reload automatically)

data.name: File_SelectWorkspaceTip
data.value: Select this file in the Workspace

data.name: File_GoToParentTip
data.value: Go to the parent file (the file that includes this one)

data.name: File_GoToParentMany
data.value: This file is included by several files:

data.name: RelMap_IncludeFilesTip
data.value: Show the host thconfig / .th / .th2 files as nodes too

data.name: RelMap_RefreshTip
data.value: Rebuild the diagram from the current workspace

data.name: RelMap_SizeByLevelTip
data.value: Bigger nodes near the root, smaller leaves — fits large workspaces better

data.name: RelMap_FitTip
data.value: Fit the whole diagram in view

data.name: RelMap_Hint
data.value: Drag nodes to rearrange · double-click a node to open its definition · hover a link to see it, double-click the link to jump to where the relation is defined.

data.name: QExport_Intro
data.value: Compose a one-off export. A temporary thconfig is generated from the active workspace, built, and the result opened.

data.name: Refs_None
data.value: No references to '{0}' were found in the workspace.

data.name: DC_NoModelHelp
data.value: Download a WMM.COF (NOAA, public domain) and place it in %AppData%/ThIDE, or click "Load model…".

data.name: About_Blurb
data.value: An editor and build environment for Therion cave-survey projects. Targets Therion v6.4.0 (thbook bundled).

data.name: Mapiah_Message
data.value:
The Mapiah sketch editor could not be found on this computer.
Install Mapiah from its releases page, then set the path to mapiah.exe in Settings → External Tools (the "mapiah" row).

data.name: Cmd_Watermark
data.value: Type a command… (@ document symbol · # workspace symbol · :42 go to line)

data.name: Cmd_NoSymbols
data.value: (no symbols — open and parse a thconfig/workspace first)

data.name: Notif_3DDisabledMsg
data.value: Enable the embedded 3D model viewer in Preferences ▸ Build / Visualization.

data.name: Notif_RecoveredMsg
data.value: {0} file(s) had unsaved changes when the app last closed unexpectedly.

data.name: Notif_UnstuckBody
data.value: The window was left disabled by a dialog that had already closed, so it stopped responding to clicks. It has been re-enabled; the details are in the log.

data.name: Notif_ScaffoldOverwritesSource
data.value: The target folder is the survey's own folder, so the generated wrapper would overwrite '{0}'. Pick a different folder.

data.name: Scaffold_Intro
data.value: Builds a compilable project around a bare (e.g. TopoDroid-exported) survey .th: creates the folder tree, copies the survey into th/, and writes a wrapper .th plus a thconfig with the exports you choose.

data.name: Scaffold_GeoHint
data.value: Needed for KML / shapefile / GIS export. Coordinate order follows the coordinate system — for lat-long it is latitude then longitude. Leave blank to emit a commented template instead.

data.name: Scaffold_PickSource
data.value: Choose a survey .th file (e.g. from TopoDroid)

data.name: Notif_ToolNotFoundMsg
data.value: '{0}' was not found on PATH or in Settings ▸ External Tools.

data.name: Viewer3D_DevToolsHint
data.value: Developer tools: right-click the 3D view ▸ Inspect, or press F12. JS logs are also in the Log panel.

data.name: WebView_LinuxEngineMissing
data.value: The embedded web engine (WebKitGTK) is not installed. Install the webkit2gtk package (Ubuntu/Debian: libwebkit2gtk-4.1-0), then restart ThIDE.

data.name: Dlg_LoadFolderMsg
data.value: Open this folder as the active workspace?

data.name: Dlg_NotThconfigFmt
data.value: "{0}" could not be read as a Therion configuration.

data.name: Struct_StatusNoData
data.value: No centreline data in scope. Open a survey (.th) with measurements.

data.name: Assoc_Intro
data.value: Choose which Therion file types open in ThIDE when you double-click them in your file manager. Nothing changes until you use a button below.

data.name: Assoc_NoteWindows
data.value: Associations are stored per-user in the Windows registry (no administrator rights needed). If you have previously chosen another default app for a type, Windows may still ask you to confirm the change.

data.name: Assoc_NoteLinux
data.value: Associations use the freedesktop xdg-mime system (per-user). The xdg-utils package must be installed.

data.name: Assoc_NoteUnsupported
data.value: Managing file associations from the app is not supported on this operating system. Set ThIDE as the default app from your file manager instead.

data.name: Pref_Vis_PdfInternal
data.value: Open clicked PDFs in the in-app viewer

data.name: Pref_Vis_Model3DInternal
data.value: Open clicked .lox / .3d models in the built-in 3D viewer

data.name: Tb_ValidateOnType
data.value: Validate on type — re-check the file and whole thconfig file-tree as you type (not just on save)

data.name: Pref_ValidateOnType
data.value: Validate on type (file + whole thconfig file-tree)

data.name: Pref_ValidateOnTypeHelp
data.value: Re-validate the whole object graph from the unsaved editor buffers on a short typing pause, instead of only on save. Off by default — it re-analyses the thconfig file-tree on every pause, which can be heavy on large workspaces.

data.name: Tb_DoubleClickNav
data.value: Double-click to go to definition — a single click just places the caret (CTRL + click also available for navigation to definition in this mode).

data.name: Pref_DoubleClickNav
data.value: Require a double-click to go to definition (or CTRL + click for single-click navigation behaviour)

data.name: Pref_DoubleClickNavHelp
data.value: When on, a single click on an identifier just places the caret (so you can edit it); a double-click jumps to its declaration. When off, a single click navigates like a hyperlink. Ctrl+click always navigates.

data.name: Replace_UndoTip
data.value: Undo the last Replace All across every file it changed

data.name: Replace_RedoTip
data.value: Re-apply the last undone Replace All across every file

data.name: Close_SavePromptMsg
data.value: Do you want to save the changes you made to "{0}" before closing it?

data.name: Log_CopyAllTip
data.value: Copy every extracted field to the clipboard
